name: Cash America Super Pawn
description_short: Cash America Super Pawn operates multiple pawn shop locations across the Fort Worth, TX area, offering collateral-based loans and retail merchandise sales.
description_long: Cash America Super Pawn is a pawn shop operator with multiple retail locations throughout the Fort Worth and surrounding Texas areas. The company has been established long enough to operate a store locator network, indicating a multi-store operation in the Dallas-Fort Worth metropolitan region. Their primary business model centers on pawn lending and retail sales of merchandise. Cash America offers pawn loan services where customers can borrow money by using personal items as collateral, with loan amounts determined by item value rather than credit history or employment status. They accept a wide range of collateral including jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, cameras, tools, DVDs, CDs, and similar items. Beyond lending, Cash America operates retail storefronts selling previously pawned or purchased merchandise at discounted prices. Their stores maintain consistent operating hours (primarily 9:00 AM - 7:00 PM) and are located in areas including Benbrook, Fort Worth, Lake Worth, and River Oaks, Texas. The company competes in a local market with other pawn operators and used goods retailers. Cash America distinguishes itself primarily through store accessibility and product variety across multiple locations rather than through innovative lending terms or technology. For consumers seeking quick collateral-based loans without credit checks, Cash America provides a straightforward alternative to traditional lending, though the pawn model inherently involves the risk of losing personal property if loans are not repaid.
pros: No credit check required—loans based solely on item value
Fast funding available when you bring in acceptable collateral
Multiple convenient locations across Fort Worth area for accessibility
Wide range of acceptable collateral items (jewelry, electronics, instruments, tools, etc.)
No employment or income verification needed to qualify for a loan
Transparent retail operations—can purchase discounted merchandise from other customers' pawned items
Extended operating hours (9 AM - 7 PM) across all locations for accessibility
cons: Risk of permanent loss of personal property if loan is not repaid within the pawn period
Website provides no information about loan terms, interest rates, or pawn period duration
Limited transparency regarding fees, redemption costs, or renewal terms
No online application or loan process information available
Collateral-based model means higher-value items required for substantial loans
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history who need quick emergency cash
People with valuable personal items who prefer collateral-based loans over credit checks
Those seeking short-term cash without formal credit verification processes
Bargain shoppers interested in discounted electronics, jewelry, and used merchandise
diagnosis: Cash America Super Pawn is best for consumers with poor or no credit who need emergency cash quickly and have valuable personal property to use as collateral. The main caveat is that failure to repay results in permanent loss of the collateral item, and the company provides limited online transparency about specific loan terms, rates, and fees.
services: Pawn loans on personal items (jewelry, electronics, cameras, musical instruments)
Retail sales of previously pawned merchandise
In-store store locator and location finder
Game system and gaming merchandise pawn services
